flags.description: Enable debug output
flags.name: --debug

flags.description: Simulate the execution without changing state
flags.name: --dry-run

flags.description: Root password used to bootstrap GitLab when HAL starts it (default "hal9000FTW")
flags.name: --gitlab-root-password string

flags.description: Alias of --tfe-vcs-oauth-token-id
flags.name: --gitlab-token-id string

flags.description: Version of the GitLab CE image used for shared Terraform workspace setup (default "18.10.1-ce.0")
flags.name: --gitlab-version string

flags.description: GitLab project name for the Terraform workspace demo (default "tfe-agent-demo")
flags.name: --project-name string

flags.description: GitLab project path for the Terraform workspace demo (default "tfe-agent-demo")
flags.name: --project-path string

flags.description: Initial TFE admin email used when bootstrapping via IACT (default "haladmin@localhost")
flags.name: --tfe-admin-email string

flags.description: Initial TFE admin password used when bootstrapping via IACT (default "hal9000FTW")
flags.name: --tfe-admin-password string

flags.description: Initial TFE admin username used when bootstrapping via IACT (default "haladmin")
flags.name: --tfe-admin-username string

flags.description: Terraform Enterprise app API token (or set TFE_API_TOKEN)
flags.name: --tfe-api-token string

flags.description: Terraform Enterprise organization name to bootstrap (default "hal")
flags.name: --tfe-org string

flags.description: Terraform Enterprise project name to bootstrap (default "Dave")
flags.name: --tfe-project string

flags.description: Optional regex for VCS tag-triggered runs (leave empty to disable)
flags.name: --tfe-tags-regex string

flags.description: Terraform Enterprise base URL (default "https://tfe.localhost:8443")
flags.name: --tfe-url string

flags.description: Git branch to trigger VCS runs from (set non-main for tag-focused workflows) (default "main")
flags.name: --tfe-vcs-branch string

flags.description: Terraform Enterprise VCS OAuth token id for linking the workspace to GitLab (or set TFE_GITLAB_OAUTH_TOKEN_ID)
flags.name: --tfe-vcs-oauth-token-id string

flags.description: Terraform Enterprise workspace name to bootstrap (default "tfe-agent-demo")
flags.name: --tfe-workspace string

flags.description: Bootstrap or reuse shared GitLab and configure a Terraform demo repository
flags.name: -e, --enable

flags.description: help for workspace
flags.name: -h, --help
